omniroute.name: OmniRoute
omniroute.description: Unified AI proxy/router — route any LLM through one endpoint. 232 providers, 15 routing strategies, 87 MCP tools, 42 i18n locales.

containers.name: Next.js App Router
containers.description: API routes (v1 chat, embeddings, images, audio, video, search, rerank), dashboard UI, SSE streaming, i18n (42 locales)

containers.name: SQLite Database
containers.description: Persistence layer with 83 domain modules, 97 schema migrations, 17 base tables. Encryption at rest for sensitive fields.

containers.name: open-sse Engine
containers.description: Core streaming engine: handler pipeline, provider executors (20+), format translators, combo routing (15 strategies), prompt compression pipeline

containers.name: MCP Server
containers.description: 87 MCP tools across 30 auth scopes. 3 transports (stdio/SSE/Streamable HTTP). Tool categories: core (20), cache, compression, 1proxy, memory, skills, gamification, plugins, Notion, Obsidian.

containers.name: A2A Server
containers.description: Agent-to-Agent protocol server with SSE streaming, Task Manager (TTL cleanup), 8 skills (cost analysis, quota, routing, discovery, health, capabilities, dispatch).

containers.name: Electron Desktop
containers.description: Cross-platform desktop app (Windows, macOS, Linux) wrapping the Next.js UI and MCP server.

relationships.description: Proxies API requests to handler pipeline
Reads quotas, pricing, health for skill results
